There are several different '''game modes''' in [[OpenLieroX]].

* Deathmatch
* Team Deathmatch
* Tag
* Demolition
* Capture The Flag (CTF)
* Hide & Seek
* Race
* Team Race

It is not really that hard to develop your own game mode. You can read about this [/forum/index.php/topic,12112.0.html here].

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20120321062509/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Game_modes -->
